top_signals.title: Philippines denounces AI video from China state media as racist
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: AI Upheaval Crushes Retail Traders Crowding Into Leveraged Funds
top_signals.summary: A surprise breakthrough from Chinese startup Moonshot rippled through global markets Friday, sending AI and semiconductor stocks sharply lower and reviving memories of last year’s so-called DeepSeek moment. It was the latest reminder that markets is being reshaped at extraordinary speed and that assumptions about tomorrow’s winners can change almost overnight.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Chinese startup Moonshot AI unveils Kimi model it says rivals OpenAI, Anthropic
top_signals.summary: It's the latest AI model from China to close the performance gap with leading U.S. AI labs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Abbott Laboratories probes two cyber incidents amid extortion claims
top_signals.summary: Abbott Laboratories is investigating two separate cybersecurity incidents after confirming unauthorized access to internal legacy Exact Sciences systems in its Cancer Diagnostics business, while also investigating a separate claim that attackers breached its LabCentral portal and stole company data. [...]
